name: Chicken Tostada Salad Ala Loren
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Mild or hot chili pepper
7 ounces Boneless, skinless chicken breasts, diced
1 ounce Low-fat jack or cheddar cheese, shredded/grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions, green pepper, chili pepper, and garlic. Cook until onion is soft (about 2-3 minutes).
3. Add chicken to the skillet. Stir often until chicken is no longer pink (about 2-3 minutes).
4. Stir in beans, cilantro, and lime juice. Simmer on low heat for about 10 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir in chopped tomato.
6. Serve over lettuce. Sprinkle with cheese, olives, and chips.
